svg.title: Databricks industrial digital twin — platform architecture
svg.desc: Structural containment diagram: Unity Catalog, Databricks App, Lakebase, and Lakehouse inside the Databricks platform, with a DABs deployment block below and labeled data-flow arrows.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What is the Unity Catalog schema structure in the digital twin repo?')
sendPrompt('What schema does the digital twin use in Unity Catalog?')
sendPrompt('What is stored in the raw_data volume?')
sendPrompt('What YAML config files are stored in the configs volume?')
sendPrompt('What frontend stack does the digital twin app use?')
sendPrompt('How does the FastAPI backend work in the digital twin app?')
sendPrompt('How are YAML configs bundled into the Databricks App?')
sendPrompt('How does the simulation engine work in the digital twin?')
sendPrompt('How does OAuth M2M work for Lakebase access in the app?')
sendPrompt('What is the Lakebase endpoint format in the digital twin?')
sendPrompt('What is stored in the scenarios table?')
sendPrompt('What is stored in the reports table?')
sendPrompt('What historical telemetry does the Lakehouse store?')
sendPrompt('How is ML training used for predictive maintenance in the digital twin?')
sendPrompt('What does databricks.yml configure in the digital twin?')
sendPrompt('What does resources/app.yml define in the DABs bundle?')
